when_to_help: Wrong use of quotes in string operations
Confusion about input() returning strings vs numbers

key_concepts.explanation: use print() with quotes around the text to display it
use input('prompt') to read text from the user
use type() to see what kind of data a value holds

pro_tips: print() is a function, so always use parentheses () around its argument
input() always returns a string - convert to int or float if needed
type() helps debug: if output is wrong, check variable types with type()
